description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:11 Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define two stages: test and reports. In the test stage add a test job that runs `npm install` then `npm test` and stores the coverage/ directory as an artifact that expires after 30 days. Also in the test stage add an eslint job that runs `npm install` followed by `$(npm bin)/eslint .`. In the reports stage add a pages job that depends on the test job, creates a folder `public/$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME`, moves the coverage/ directory into it, and publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact that expires after 30 days.
